common.locale.label: Language
auth.login.title: forge your run
auth.login.copy: Sign in with a pilot name or connect a compatible wallet to restore your vault, inspect your assets, and launch straight into the arena.
auth.wallet.title: wallet login
auth.wallet.copy: Use a compatible EVM wallet to sign in and inspect on-chain balances.
auth.wallet.unavailable: No compatible wallet provider was detected in this browser.
auth.error.usernameRequired: Enter a pilot name before continuing.
auth.error.loginFailed: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.
auth.error.walletLoginFailed: Wallet sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.error.walletUnavailable: No compatible wallet provider was detected in this browser.
auth.error.walletSessionChanged: Wallet session changed. Please sign in again.
lobby.title: Welcome, {username}
game.exit.title: Exit game?
game.exit.description: Your current game will close and you will return to the lobby.
game.error.exitCancelled: The game is not ready to exit yet.
game.error.exitFailed: Unable to exit the game right now. Please try again.
